trace.final_text:
All steps complete! Here are the final results:

```json
{
  "resized_url":   "https://cdn.example.com/resized_photo_8821.jpg",
  "thumbnail_url": "https://cdn.example.com/thumb_photo_8821.jpg",
  "exif": {
    "camera":  "Canon EOS R5",
    "iso":     400,
    "shutter": "1/200"
  }
}
```

**Summary of what was executed:**
| Step | Tool | Result |
|------|------|--------|
| ① (parallel) | `resize_image` → 1200px wide | `/processed/resized_photo_8821.jpg` |
| ① (parallel) | `make_thumbnail` → 200px square | `/processed/thumb_photo_8821.jpg` |
| ① (parallel) | `extract_exif` | Canon EOS R5, ISO 400, 1/200s |
| ② (parallel) | `upload_to_cdn` (resized) | CDN URL returned ✅ |
| ② (parallel) | `upload_to_cdn` (thumbnail) | CDN URL returned ✅ |

The pipeline ran in **2 round-trips** instead of 5 sequential calls, thanks to the parallelization strategy.
